'''mashanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdelloid|bdelloid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdelloid|bdelloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mashanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshængæth|mæshængæth]] || [[word:mæshængæj|mæshængæj]] || [[word:mæshængæsh|mæshængæsh]] || [[word:mæshængæ|mæshængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashashangath|mashashangath]] || [[word:mashashangaj|mashashangaj]] || [[word:mashashangash|mashashangash]] || [[word:mashashanga|mashashanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashangath|mashangath]] || [[word:mashangaj|mashangaj]] || [[word:mashangash|mashangash]] || [[word:mashanga|mashanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashafngath|mashafngath]] || [[word:mashafngaj|mashafngaj]] || [[word:mashafngash|mashafngash]] || [[word:mashafngaf|mashafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashangatha|mashangatha]] || [[word:mashangaja|mashangaja]] || [[word:mashangasha|mashangasha]] || [[word:mashangaka|mashangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashangath|mashangath]] || [[word:mashangaj|mashangaj]] || [[word:mashangash|mashangash]] || [[word:mashanga|mashanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashangathal|mashangathal]] || [[word:mashangajal|mashangajal]] || [[word:mashangashal|mashangashal]] || [[word:mashangakal|mashangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashangathatha|mashangathatha]] || [[word:mashangajaja|mashangajaja]] || [[word:mashangashasha|mashangashasha]] || [[word:mashangaka|mashangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashangathan|mashangathan]] || [[word:mashangajan|mashangajan]] || [[word:mashangashan|mashangashan]] || [[word:mashangakan|mashangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashangathaoro|mashangathaoro]] || [[word:mashangajaoro|mashangajaoro]] || [[word:mashangashaoro|mashangashaoro]] || [[word:mashangakaoro|mashangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
